title: fix(audio): handle response_format=text/srt/vtt in Whisper STT
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- The OVH Whisper path forwarded the caller's `response_format` upstream, then `JSON.parse`d the body unconditionally — so `response_format=text` returned plain text that crashed the parser and **500'd** the request. The user never got their transcription.
- Now always request `verbose_json` from OVH (keeps `usage.seconds` for billing), parse once with a clean 502 guard, then reformat locally to text/srt/vtt/verbose_json/json — mirroring the scribe path. Makes the already-advertised `srt`/`vtt` formats actually work.
- Adds `formatWhisperResponse` unit tests.

Supersedes #9029. Fixes #9028.

gist.headline: Subtitles, sorted
gist.blurb: Fixed a bug where requesting text, SRT, or VTT formats from our Whisper audio transcription endpoint would crash. You can now get your audio transcripts perfectly formatted as subtitles or plain text without a hitch!
gist.summary: Fixed a 500 error in the OVH Whisper STT endpoint by standardizing upstream requests to verbose_json and locally reformatting the output to support text, srt, vtt, and json response formats.
gist.impact: Users requesting audio transcriptions with `response_format=text`, `srt`, or `vtt` will now receive properly formatted output instead of a server error.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing headphones, looking at a CRT monitor robot displaying audio waveforms and subtitles. Represents audio transcription and text formatting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, holding a glowing text script. Next to her, a chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head displays audio waveforms and subtitles on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'SRT / VTT'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
